question: Which products cost more than 50 dollars? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 50

question: How many users are there?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM users

question: What is the total revenue from all payments that have been paid?
goldSQL: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM payments WHERE status = 'paid'

question: List each order id and the name of the user who placed it.
goldSQL: SELECT o.id, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id

question: How many orders did each user place? Show the user name and the order count.
goldSQL: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.name

question: List all product names ordered by price, cheapest first.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price ASC

question: Which users have never placed an order? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders)

question: Which products are tagged BOTH 'work-from-home' AND 'premium'? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN product_tags pt ON pt.product_id = p.id JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE t.name IN ('work-from-home', 'premium') GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.name) = 2

question: Which products cost more than the average product price? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products)

question: Which categories have more than 3 products? Show the category name and the product count.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS n FROM categories c JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name HAVING COUNT(p.id) > 3

question: Which products have at least 3 reviews? Show the product name and the number of reviews.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name, COUNT(r.id) AS n FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(r.id) >= 3

question: For each product category, what is the total revenue from order items (quantity times unit price)? Show the category name and the total.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.name

question: List each subcategory and the name of its parent category.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name, p.name AS parent FROM categories c JOIN categories p ON c.parent_id = p.id

question: Which shipments have shipped but not been delivered yet? List their tracking numbers.
goldSQL: SELECT tracking_number FROM shipments WHERE shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND delivered_at IS NULL

question: Which products are tagged 'work-from-home' but NOT 'premium'? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN product_tags pt ON pt.product_id = p.id JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE t.name = 'work-from-home' AND p.id NOT IN (SELECT pt2.product_id FROM product_tags pt2 JOIN tags t2 ON t2.id = pt2.tag_id WHERE t2.name = 'premium')

question: Which order has the highest total value (sum of quantity times unit price across its items)? Give just the order id.
goldSQL: SELECT order_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id ORDER BY SUM(quantity * unit_price) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different countries do our users come from?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) AS n FROM users

question: What are the 3 most expensive products? List their names, most expensive first.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3

question: Who is the current CEO of Google?
